hero.title: Control your subscriptions before they control your account
hero.subtitle: Detect price increases, expiring promotions and services that no longer make sense. All in one place.
hero.bullet3: Find what you can cancel or switch to save.

pain.title: You're paying more than you think every month.
pain.subtitle: Forgotten subscriptions, hidden price hikes and promotions expiring without warning… slowly draining your account.
pain.forgotten_desc: That app you tried once, but keep paying for every month without noticing.
pain.silent_desc: Small price increases hidden in an email you never read.
pain.promo_desc: The free month that suddenly turns into an annual fee.
pain.drip_desc: Payments of €5 or €10 that, added up, cost hundreds of euros a year.

features.title: Killer Control watches it for you
features.subtitle: The app that alerts you when a subscription deserves your attention, so only you decide.
features.promo_desc: Never pay full price again by mistake.
features.charges_desc: A single view to know what gets charged tomorrow, next week or next month.
features.savings_desc: Discover cheaper alternatives or shared plans that work for you.
features.hero_title: Everything that matters, in one view
features.hero_subtitle: Refined design so information flows without noise.

how.title: That simple
how.step1_desc: Enter your subscriptions one by one or sync your invoices.
how.step2_desc: Let Killer Control notify you in advance for you 24/7.
how.step3_desc: With all the information at hand, choose what to keep and what to cancel.

pricing.title: Choose how to get started
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Switch to Premium whenever you want more control.
pricing.freemium_desc: Start controlling your subscriptions at no cost.
pricing.premium_desc: For those who really want to save.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I use Killer Control for free?
faq.a1: Yes, Killer Control has a free plan that lets you manage up to 3 subscriptions and receive basic alerts. If you need more, our Premium plans unlock advanced features.
faq.q2: What does the Premium plan include?
faq.a1_full: Yes. The free plan is designed so you can verify the tool's real value without risking anything. With it, you can connect and manage up to 3 active subscriptions.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.q4: Do I need a card to get started?

cta.title: Start taking back control today.
cta.subtitle: What you don't control, you keep paying for. Start free in less than a minute.

add.limit_desc: You have reached the limit of {count} subscriptions on the free plan.

subscription_detail.alert_desc: They raised the fee by 23% since March. Is it still worth it?

appearance.normal_desc: Optimal balance between space and readability.

notifications.title: Notifications & Alerts
notifications.subtitle: Changes are saved instantly.
notifications.billing_desc: A monthly summary of your spending.
notifications.upcoming_desc: Notified X days before each renewal.
notifications.push_desc: Allow the browser to send alerts.
notifications.renewals_desc: Get notified the day before each charge.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security

manual.title: User Guide
manual.subtitle: Master your financial freedom
manual.feature1_desc: Centralize all your subscriptions in one dashboard. Forget checking bank statements to know what you are paying for.
manual.feature2_desc: We warn you before your promotions end and detect unexpected price hikes so you don't overpay.
manual.feature3_desc: Our engine finds cheaper alternatives with the same features, saving you hundreds of dollars a year.
manual.feature4_desc: No more mazes to cancel. We give you the exact steps and tricks to unsubscribe in seconds.
manual.step1_desc: Register your current subscriptions indicating the price and renewal date.
manual.step2_desc: Check the intelligence notifications on your Dashboard about hikes or promotions.
manual.step3_desc: Use our comparisons to find better plans or guides to cancel what you don't use.
manual.pro_tip_desc: Check the 'Intelligence' section in your Dashboard weekly. It's where our engine detects silent price hikes from platforms like Netflix or Adobe.

testimonials.name: Javier M.
testimonials.quote: I've saved almost €200 a year after detecting 3 applications I no longer used. The app is amazing.

testimonials.name: Laura S.
testimonials.quote: With so many platforms at home we didn't even know what we were paying anymore. Killer Control has put us in order.

testimonials.name: Carlos P.
testimonials.quote: I love the price increase alerts. Netflix raised my fee and I found out instantly through the app.
